stemHtml: What factors need to be taken into account when calculating the take-off performance for an MRJT ferry flight in very cold temperatures?

options.a: The use of anti-icing and de-icing equipment is not necessary for take-off performance calculation.
options.b: The weight of the aircraft has no effect on the take-off performance in cold temperatures.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> cannot be limited in any way due to regulatory requirements.
